structuralValidation.method: Pinned-identity reducer selected five exact ordinal, frame, and timestamp checkpoints from the recorder-v2 session. It compared complete canonical filter identities and native suppression identities, verified the exact one-condition to two-condition transition, observed the matching suggested row remain visible with its add action suppressed, verified editor closure and exact two-condition persistence on reopening, and verified cleanup restored the exact original one-condition identity. Mutation checks: pass 7, fail 0. Whole-session selected-frame summary: pass 31, fail 0, inconclusive 2; the unrelated status-state checks were not captured in this session.
